messages.content: You are a rigorous structured-judgment engine. Judge only the stated attribute. Use the item text, not outside popularity. Return strict JSON only. Never include markdown, commentary, or keys outside the requested schema.

Case: model_policy_options
Description: Rank live OpenRouter judging policies for public structured-judgment receipts.

Attributes:
- public_receipt_credibility (weight 0.45): credibility as a judge model for evidence that will be shown to serious external readers
- cost_discipline (weight 0.3): ability to support many repeated live benchmark runs without wasting provider spend
- route_freshness (weight 0.25): current OpenRouter availability, parameter support, and fit for structured judgment prompts

Items:
- quality_only_opus_46: Fixed anthropic/claude-opus-4.6 policy. High-cost path for public receipts where careful comparative reasoning matters more than spend.
- sonnet_reference_then_fast: Use anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6 for a frozen reference or disputed cases, then use a cheaper current model for repeated candidate-regime sweeps.
- deepseek_v4_flash_fast: Fixed deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash policy for cheap high-volume smoke tests, prompt iteration, and broad first-pass sweeps.
- glm_5_2_logprob_candidate: Use z-ai/glm-5.2 when logprob support, low prompt cost, and large context matter more than maximum brand credibility.
- kimi_k2_thinking_diverse: Use moonshotai/kimi-k2-thinking as a diverse reasoning judge for contested comparisons or cross-model adjudication.

Task: Score every item independently on every attribute. Output JSON exactly like this schema: {"scores": [{"id": "item id", "attributes": {"attribute_id": {"score": "number from 0 to 100", "confidence": "number from 0 to 1"}}}]}
